title: North Korea Launches Multiple Ballistic Missiles Off East Coast
content:
North Korea launched missiles.
*   The launches involved multiple ballistic missiles.
*   The incident occurred off its East Coast.

title: Quote of the Day by Martin Luther King: 'We have guided missiles and misguided men'
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The quote by Martin Luther King Jr. highlights the stark contrast between humanity's advanced technological capabilities (represented by "guided missiles") and its moral or ethical shortcomings ("misguided men").
*   It implicitly critiques the irony that while we can precisely direct powerful destructive tools, humanity often lacks wisdom, sound judgment, or proper guidance in its own actions and decisions.
*   The statement serves as a powerful call for self-reflection, urging a re-evaluation of priorities where human wisdom and moral leadership should ideally match or exceed technological progress.

title: North Korea conducts fresh missile tests at sea; South Korea on alert
content:
North Korea has conducted fresh missile tests.
*   The tests were carried out at sea.
*   South Korea has been placed on alert in response.

title: Florida man fools elderly woman into paying $600,000 in gold through ‘phantom hacker’ scheme
content:
A Florida man scammed an elderly woman.
*   He used a sophisticated "phantom hacker" scheme to deceive her.
*   The victim was manipulated into paying $600,000 in gold.
